messages.subject: [R-jobs] Project based in US for a Data Scientist
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Project based in US for a Data Scientist
messages.body_plain:
Many people like me are multilingual albeit this being an R forum is not a
great place to ask and waste the time of many...

On Fri, Sep 30, 2022, 7:03 AM Eusebi Llensa <ellensa at outvise.com> wrote:

> Yes. This position requires Python and SQL.
>
> Sorry for the confusion.
>
>
>
> On Fri, 30 Sep 2022 at 12:50, Ilya Kipnis <ilya.kipnis at gmail.com> wrote:
>
> > The position explicitly asks for Python, not R.
> >

> >

> >>

> can
